title: Anthropic Just Replaced Claude Code With New Claude Tag
summary: Anthropic launched Claude Tag, a team-based version of Claude Code that integrates with Slack and company tools for collaborative task management. It replaces the previous Claude Slack chatbot and is available as a research preview with plans for wider rollout.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's launch of Claude Tag, a team-based AI agent built for Slack that replaces the earlier Claude Code chatbot. Claude Tag connects to company tools and supports task management within public channels, embedding AI workflows directly into team communication. The shift matters because it moves Claude from a standalone coding assistant toward a collaborative agent operating inside existing communication platforms.
